scripts.build: pnpm --filter baroview-core build && pnpm --filter baroview build && pnpm --filter baroview-cdn build && cp packages/baroview-cdn/dist/baroview-cdn.js apps/html/public/baroview-cdn.js
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter baroview-core build && pnpm --filter baroview build && pnpm --filter baroview-cdn build
